rationale: Addressed the review bundle: required-skill names now allow underscores, deployment skills are fetched by requested/required slug instead of scanning every definition, filesystem frontmatter reads run off the event loop, and deployment artifact metadata carries required-skill closure data.
Deployment-sourced skills now persist and load required_skills metadata from version artifact metadata, and resolver closure fetches required deployment skills on demand before launch.
Informational automated Codex review banner with no actionable code feedback.
